'''shafaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherlessness|featherlessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherlessness|featherlessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shafaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæfæyæth|shæfæyæth]] || [[word:shæfæyæj|shæfæyæj]] || [[word:shæfæyæsh|shæfæyæsh]] || [[word:shæfæyæ|shæfæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafafayath|shafafayath]] || [[word:shafafayaj|shafafayaj]] || [[word:shafafayash|shafafayash]] || [[word:shafafaya|shafafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafayath|shafayath]] || [[word:shafayaj|shafayaj]] || [[word:shafayash|shafayash]] || [[word:shafaya|shafaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafafyafth|shafafyafth]] || [[word:shafafyafj|shafafyafj]] || [[word:shafafyafsh|shafafyafsh]] || [[word:shafafyaf|shafafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shafayatha|shafayatha]] || [[word:shafayaja|shafayaja]] || [[word:shafayasha|shafayasha]] || [[word:shafayaka|shafayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shafayath|shafayath]] || [[word:shafayaj|shafayaj]] || [[word:shafayash|shafayash]] || [[word:shafaya|shafaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shafayathal|shafayathal]] || [[word:shafayajal|shafayajal]] || [[word:shafayashal|shafayashal]] || [[word:shafayakal|shafayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shafayaathatha|shafayaathatha]] || [[word:shafayaajaja|shafayaajaja]] || [[word:shafayaashasha|shafayaashasha]] || [[word:shafayaaka|shafayaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shafayathan|shafayathan]] || [[word:shafayajan|shafayajan]] || [[word:shafayashan|shafayashan]] || [[word:shafayakan|shafayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shafayathaoro|shafayathaoro]] || [[word:shafayajaoro|shafayajaoro]] || [[word:shafayashaoro|shafayashaoro]] || [[word:shafayakaoro|shafayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
